tests.name: AAPL.US Financial Hub renders with data
tests.evidence: API returns annual (5), quarterly (8), TTM, prior_ttm data. Screenshot shows Revenue Delta YoY chart and Core 5 table.

tests.name: TTM bar in Annual view chart with distinct styling
tests.evidence: Screenshot shows TTM bar (+10.1%) at far right of delta chart with border styling

tests.name: TTM column in Core 5 Metrics table
tests.evidence: Screenshot shows TTM column: Revenue $435.62B, Net Income $117.78B

tests.name: Revenue Delta YoY percentages correct for AAPL
tests.evidence: FY'25: +6.4%, FY'24: +2.0%, FY'23: -2.8%, FY'22: +7.8%, TTM: +10.1% - matches API calculation

tests.name: XXII.US Burning Cash pill logic
tests.evidence: API confirms TTM FCF = -$14.98M < 0, getFinancialVitalsPill() returns 'Burning Cash'

key_functions: calculateYoYDelta() - YoY delta calculation with quarterly/annual mode
getFinancialVitalsPill() - Priority cascade for collapsed pill
FinancialHub component - Main UI with chart, table, toggles
